label: Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment

node.label: Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
node.definition: Edge and on-device deployment runs models near sensors or users under strict power, memory, latency, connectivity, privacy, and thermal constraints.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment is modeled as depending on Quantized inference & compressed deployment, GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators and feeding downstream nodes such as Robotics & embodied AI, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
examples: atlas downstream link to Robotics & embodied AI
atlas downstream link to Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Quantized inference & compressed deployment, GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment has an `operationalizes` dependency on Quantized inference & compressed deployment because Quantized inference & compressed deployment is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.
